title: Unnamed Sea
description: Additional structures for the sea and beach biomes, focusing on an immersive expansion for the vanilla game.
body:
![ Display the mod's title ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2a8fg8M6/images/3373565899ec6424124d4976bc836fe0b9799220.png)



# 🏖️ About 

Looking to spice up your world generation? You’ve come to the right place!

**Unnamed Sea** expands your world with unique, handcrafted structures that enrich the atmosphere of the ocean and beach biomes. Some are built for adventure and conquest, while others exist purely to enhance the visual experience and deepen your sense of immersion.

For more details, refer to the image gallery, the wiki below, or the following quick summary:

- 4 structure types / 16 total variants
  - Island (3 variants)
  - Lighthouse (2 variants)
  - Raft (9 variants)
  - Ship (2 variants)



## 🌐 Wiki

If you are looking for a wiki of sorts or just a more detailed walkthrough of the content of this mod, then you can find quick and easy introductions to all the added features of this project below.

If you find no answers to your questions here or want to suggest improvements for the project, then feel free to leave a comment on the CurseForge site ([here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/unnamed-sea)).


<details>
<summary>Supported Mods</summary>

The following mods should be natively supported. However, support for any of these mods may be broken at any time. If this is the case, feel free to comment on the CurseForge site to let me know!

... Work in progress ...

</details>



# 📬 Remarks  

Please keep in mind that at any given time vast amounts of the mod may be edited or completely overhauled! These changes should not, but may leave existing worlds on older versions corrupted. Creating backups before updating to a new version is advised!

I want to reiterate that this is simply a passion project. It may occur that for longer periods no updates or bug fixes are being developed/released simply because I do not want to.
